numerical_constraints.name: Street profile L-L' total width
numerical_constraints.condition: Street profile L-L' (30 km two directions)

reasons: Total width of 21.75 m is explicitly stated in the dimension string at the bottom of the plan view
Individual sub-dimensions sum correctly to 21.75 m
Document is a beeldkwaliteitplan (image quality plan), informative rather than legally binding regels

numerical_constraints.notes: Total street width shown in plan view dimension string: 0.75 + 2.25 + 3.00 + 4.00 + 5.80 + 4.70 + 0.75 = 21.75 m

narrative_constraints.statement: Street profile L-L' is designed as a 30 km/h two-direction street with a total width of 21.75 m, including zones for trees/greenery, footpath, carriageway, parking, and building frontage.

urban_intent_passages: Straat - profiel L-L' (30 km twee richtingen): street section showing a 21.75 m wide two-directional 30 km/h street with tree planting zones, footpaths, carriageway, and parking, illustrating the intended public realm character for this street type in Nieuw Legmeer.
